exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your creative hobbies forward
items: Create a creative space inventory by listing all your current art supplies, tools, and materials in one place
Research and identify 3 specific creative hobbies that genuinely interest you by exploring tutorials, communities, and beginner projects online
Set up dedicated storage and organization systems for your creative materials and works-in-progress
Visit a local art supply store, craft shop, or maker space to explore materials hands-on and talk to staff about beginner recommendations
Complete a small beginner project in each of your top 3 creative interests to understand the time commitment, skill requirements, and enjoyment level
Research and bookmark 5-10 high-quality learning resources (YouTube channels, online courses, or tutorial websites) for your chosen creative hobby
